summary: Verified robustified (branch, cashier) dedupe (day dropped, branch-total fallback added) for cash-register closing report. UI shows محمد صبحي EXACTLY ONCE with 2,266,500 IQD / 143 orders on 2026-07-02→07-03 for branch الفرع الرئيسي. Inflated duplicate (2,286,500 / 145) is fully absent from closing tab. Backend endpoints return correct ground-truth aggregates and both shift docs still exist in DB (no deletion). Regression pytest 6/6 passed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~25k lines — long-term modularization recommended (non-blocking).
Reports.js dedupeClosings + fetchReport truth-context build logic is subtle; extract into a small util with unit tests to lock behavior against future regressions.
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com / admin123 (tenant default, branch الفرع الرئيسي 76f56acc-6948-4a2f-bbf4-feccbddea88f, cashier محمد صبحي / msubhi-shift-0001, business_date 2026-07-02)
seed_data_creation: Not created — used pre-seeded shifts. Both محمد صبحي shifts (2,266,500/143 and 2,286,500/145) still exist in DB after test (verified via /api/shifts?status=closed&cashiers_only=true&branch_id=...).
context_for_next_testing_agent: GET /api/reports/cash-register-closing?start_date=2026-07-02&end_date=2026-07-03T23:59:59&branch_id=76f56acc-6948-4a2f-bbf4-feccbddea88f returns summary.total_sales=2266500, by_branch=[{الفرع الرئيسي, 2266500}], by_cashier=[{محمد صبحي, 2266500}], true_by_branch_day={76f56acc...|2026-07-02: 2266500}, true_by_cashier_day maps to 2266500 for both id: and name: keys. Login endpoint returns field 'token' (NOT 'access_token'). UI: Reports → إغلاق الصندوق tab has its own from/to date inputs — set via native setter + input/change events, click 'تحديث'. Individual view (كل شفت بمفرده) shows msubhi ONCE at 2,266,500/143 and header shows 'من 2 إغلاق' (msubhi + كاشير كلوز QA).
